dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8944 IH: Housing Regulatory Clarity Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Taylor (for himself, Mr. Collins, Mr. Gosar, Mr. Rulli, and Mr. Van Epps) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To prohibit the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development from considering disparate impact in carrying out any actions of the Department of Housing and Urban Development.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Housing Regulatory Clarity Act of 2026.

section.header: Prohibition on consideration of disparate impact
section.text: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development may not consider disparate impact in carrying out any actions of the Department of Housing and Urban Development.
